ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* First name of the player */,
  "surname" TEXT /* Last name of the player */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the player (e.g., defender, midfielder) */,
  "ranking" INTEGER /* Ranking of the player within the team or league */,
  "age" TEXT /* Age of the player */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player in centimeters */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Specific position the player plays (e.g., left-back, center-forward) */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "contract_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the player's contract */,
  "contract_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the player's contract */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Injury status of the player */,
  "transfer_value" TEXT /* Current transfer value of the player */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the player's profile image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the player record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the player record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "sport" TEXT /* Sport the team plays (e.g., football, basketball) */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach managing the team */,
  "home_stadium" TEXT /* Name of the home stadium */,
  "founded_year" TEXT /* Year the team was founded */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the team's logo */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the team's official website */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the team's social media profiles */,
  "championships_won" INTEGER /* Number of championships the team has won */,
  "current_ranking" INTEGER /* Current ranking of the team in the league */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the team record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the team record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* First name of the coach */,
  "coach_surname" TEXT /* Last name of the coach */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the coach */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of coaching experience */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the coach */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the coach */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the coach */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the coach's profile image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the coach record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the coach record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_rosters" (
  "roster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each roster entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player is part of */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the player joined the team */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the player (e.g., active, injured, suspended) */,
  "contract_type" TEXT /* Type of contract (e.g., permanent, loan) */,
  "injury_return_date" TEXT /* Expected return date if the player is injured */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the roster entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the roster entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("roster_id")
)
